title: Mirage (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mirage''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Mirage (Toshara)|'''The Mirage''']], a region on the [[moon]] [[Toshara]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[New Republic Intelligence Headquarters]]''' code named '''Mirage''', operations headquarters of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Intelligence Service]].
*[[Mirage (plant)|'''Mirage''']], a [[plant/Legends|shrub]] located in the New Republic Intelligence Headquarters
*[[Mirage (starship)|'''Mirage''']], a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] affiliated with the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]]

{{Disambig}}
